root: ^You open your eyes. Pain — vast, unimaginable — courses through every fibre of your being.
^The fall seems to last an eternity. Nine days and nine nights you fell, cast from the radiant heights.
^Around you: a lake of liquid fire. Above: no stars, only darkness absolute.
^Beside you, a familiar shape stirs — Beelzebub, your closest lieutenant.
^My Lord... we are fallen. Cast down. But you live.
^"Is this... all that remains? This burning prison?"
^"We are not defeated. We are FREE."

c-0: ^"A prison, yes. But not the end. You led us once — you can lead us still."
c-1: ^Beelzebub's eyes widen. A spark of the old fire returns to his gaze.
^"Free... yes. What is Heaven's light to those who can make their own?"
c-2: ^You rise slowly. The landscape stretches endlessly — jagged obsidian shores, rivers of molten sulphur, and in the distance, shapes. Thousands of them. Your army, broken but breathing.
^"They await your word, my Lord. As always."

join: ^You stand. The pain recedes — not gone, but mastered. You are Satan, the Adversary, and this is only the beginning.
^The lake of fire stretches before you. What was once punishment shall become your throne room.
